data_collected.source_quote: Name and contact details such as email addresses, phone numbers, and billing/shipping addresses, as well as payment method details like credit/debit card numbers and bank account info.

purposes: comply with legal and regulatory requirements
purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Stripe collects customer data to process payments, prevent fraud, and meet regulatory requirements.

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Stripe does not transfer personal data to third parties in exchange for payment.

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Stripe may provide personal data to third party partners, such as advertising partners, analytics providers, and social networks.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Third parties that Stripe shares data with include Business Users and their authorized partners, financial partners, App Marketplace developers, Stripe affiliates, and service providers.

retention_period.source_quote: Call recordings normally retained for up to 1 year, user support phone calls for 5 years, collection calls for 5 years.

access_your_data.source_quote: You have the right to request access of the Personal Data Stripe holds related to you.

delete_your_data.source_quote: Following termination of an agreement, Stripe will delete or return personal data except as required by law.

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: You have the right to request rectification of the Personal Data Stripe holds.

gaps: AI training data use not addressed
opt-out of data sharing not clearly stated
GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Stripe's policy emphasizes payment processing and fraud prevention but lacks specificity on data retention beyond call recordings. User rights are partially addressed but data portability and appeal mechanisms are not mentioned. Security measures are not detailed in the privacy policy itself.
